title: Open the app and navigate to the 'Vehicles' screen
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the 'Vehicles' screen

title: Verify the header and list rows
test_steps: Verify the header shows the menu icon and the title 'Vehicles' | Verify there are two list rows, each with an image, a title, and a subtitle
expected_result: The header and list rows are displayed correctly

title: Click on the red circular button with a plus sign
test_steps: Click on the red circular button with a plus sign
expected_result: A new vehicle configuration option is added

title: Navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Navigate back to the previous screen

title: Verify data persistence
preconditions: The app is closed and reopened
test_steps: Close the app | Reopen the app | Navigate to the 'Vehicles' screen
expected_result: The 'Vehicles' screen is displayed with the same data as before
